What are you changing in this PR?

### Checklist

🚨Please review the [guidelines for contributing](../CONTRIBUTING.md) to this repository.

- [ ] **Tests:** Have I added or updated NUnit tests for this logic?
- [ ] **MAUI/XAML:** Does the UI scale correctly on Desktop (Windows)?
- [ ] **Formatting:** Did you run `dotnet format`?
- [ ] **Clean Code:** Removed any `Console.WriteLine` or leftover debug comments?
- [ ] **Test Character:** have you attached a test character demonstrating the changes in this PR?
